COMPONENTTITLE: List Of Organization Unit (HOD, VC & TNC Setup)
Datatable column details: {"dt_bi": ["No", "Code", "Description", "Head of Department", "VC/TNC", "Action"], "dt_bm": ["No", "Code", "Description", "Head of Department", "VC/TNC", "Action"], "dt_js": ["return row.index", "", "", "", "", "return ''+\r\n``"], "dt_key": ["", "oun_code", "oun_desc", "st_staff_id_head", "st_staff_id_superior", ""], "dt_ajax": "api/API_VC_TNC_SETUP?vctnc=1", "dt_post": null, "dt_sort": ["unsortable", "asc", "default", "default", "default", "unsortable"], "dt_bInfo": "true", "dt_class": ["", "", "", "", "", "action-column"], "dt_print": "false", "dt_filter": "default", "dt_bPaginate": "true", "dt_pageLength": "10", "dt_bLengthChange": "false"}
Business Logic (BL) Details:
<?php
include('db.php');
include('userinfo.php');

if($_GET['vctnc']){
	
    //============================================================ common filter
    $common = "FROM ".DB2.".organization_unit 
			   LEFT JOIN ".DB2.".staff ON (st_staff_id_head = stf_staff_id) 
               WHERE
                CONCAT_WS('__',
					oun_code,
					oun_desc,
					st_staff_id_superior
                ) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')  
    ";
	
    //============================================================ record count
    $sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) C $common";
    $recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql,[$_POST['search']['value']])[0]['C'];

    //============================================================ main sql
    $sql = "SELECT 
                oun_id id,
				oun_code,
                oun_desc,
				CONCAT_WS(' - ',st_staff_id_head, stf_staff_name) st_staff_id_head,
				CONCAT_WS(' - ',st_staff_id_superior,oun_extended_field->>'$.st_staff_name_superior') st_staff_id_superior
        $common 
        ORDER BY {$_POST['orderBy'][0]} {$_POST['orderBy'][1]}
        LIMIT ".$_POST['start'].", ".$_POST['length']."
    ";
    $data = executeQueryV2($sql,[$_POST['search']['value']]);

    //============================================================ finally
    $result = [
        'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
        'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered,
        'data' => $data,
    ];

}else if($_GET['displayData']){
	$sqlData = "SELECT 
					oun_id id,
					oun_code,
					oun_desc,
					st_staff_id_head,
					st_staff_id_superior, #FLC_ID,
					oun_extended_field->>'$.st_staff_name_superior' FLC_NAME
				FROM ".DB2.".organization_unit 
				LEFT JOIN ".DB2.".staff ON (st_staff_id_head = stf_staff_id) 
				WHERE oun_id = ?
    ";
    $rsData = executeQueryV2($sqlData,[$_POST['id']]);

	foreach($rsData as $y){
		$opt = $opt.'<option value="'.$y['FLC_ID'].'">'.$y['FLC_NAME'].' - '.$y['FLC_NAME'].'</option>';
	}
	
	$result = [
		'status' => 'ok',
		'oun_id' => $rsData[0]['id'],
		'oun_code' => $rsData[0]['oun_code'],
		'oun_desc' => $rsData[0]['oun_desc'],
		'st_staff_id_head' => $rsData[0]['st_staff_id_head'],
		'stf_id_supervisor' => $rsData[0]['st_staff_id_superior'],
		'opt' => $opt
	];
}else if($_GET['saveData']){

        $updateLookup ="UPDATE ".DB2.".organization_unit 
							SET	
								st_staff_id_head = ?,
								st_staff_id_superior = ?,
								oun_extended_field = JSON_SET(oun_extended_field,
													'$.st_staff_name_superior', ?,
													'$.st_staff_title_superior', ?),
								updateddate			= NOW(),
								updatedby			= '".$_USER['USERNAME']."'
						WHERE oun_id = ?
					";
		$rs = executeQueryV2($updateLookup, [$_POST['st_staff_id_head'], $_POST['st_staff_id_superior'],$_POST['st_staff_name_superior'],$_POST['st_staff_title_superior'],$_POST['oun_id']]);

	if($rs){
		$result = [
			'status' => 'ok',
		];
	}else{
		$result = [
			'status' => 'ko',
			'msg' =>'Data cannot be save.'
		];
	}	
}
return $result;

Form_Item_lookup_query:
select stf_staff_id FLC_ID, 
CONCAT(upper(stf_extended_field->>'$.stf_title_desc'),stf_staff_name) FLC_NAME,
stf_extended_field->>'$.stf_title_desc' _title
from fims_usr.staff where stf_staff_id in ('VC0','TNC001','TNC002','TNC003');
